since_last: 65% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.70%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.27% · BTC +0.70% · Gold +1.55% · Nasdaq100 +0.93%. 65% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.70%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.70%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.57%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.57%, AMAT +8.05%, SYNA +7.96%, KLAC +7.83%, AMD +7.78%. Laggards: AVAV -6.39%, PLTR -4.82%, SOUN -4.78%, INOD -3.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.30% at $148.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.30% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
